executives.name: Adam Lundin
executives.background: Mr. Lundin has many years of experience in the natural resource sector. He is the Chair of the Board and previously served as President and CEO of Josemaria Resources Inc.

executives.name: Ian Gibbs
executives.background: Mr. Gibbs is a Canadian Chartered Professional Accountant with over 25 years of experience in the resource sector. He has served as CFO for several public companies.
